rulings.Case Title: BRANDY A. TRUEMAN VS. CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 17, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY, JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Hearing required 1) re jurisidiction of property in Marin County; 2) No breach of contract therefore can't be based on site of contract. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BANK OF AMERICA N.A., VS. JOSE MUNGUIA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Issue And/Or Evidentiary And/Or Terminating Sanctions And Req. For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $1040.00; Memo Of P & A; Dec And Pos
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 17, 2012, line 2. PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA N.A.'s, Motion For Issue And/Or Evidentiary And/Or Terminating Sanctions And Request For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $1040.00. Grant terminating sanctions plus $340.00. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE VS. ERLINDA V HERBERT
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Compel Responses To Pltf'S Req For Production Of Docs
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 17, 2012, line 5. PLAINTIFF DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY's Motion To Compel Responses To Plaintiff'S Request For Production Of Documents. Grant motion to compel production of documents plus $540.00 monetry sanctions, jointly and severally liable as to all defendants. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SHREE JALARAM LODGING LP VS. CASSANDRA WATKINS et al

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT E FORMICHI et al VS. SIMSF, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al

rulings.Case Title: KAREN TOM et al VS. JANIE VINSON et al

rulings.Case Title: PAUL ARRIAZA et al VS. MICHAEL THORN et al
rulings.Rulings: DUnlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 17, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANT MICHAEL THORN, JR.'s MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Deny, failed to sustain burden and meet CCP 473(b). = (501/REQ)
